title: abies nordmanniana var. eichleri
intro: Abies nordmanniana var. eichleri, also known as Nordmann Fir, is a variety of evergreen tree native to the Black Sea region. The essential oil extracted from its needles is rich in alpha-pinene and beta-pinene, which possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant properties. The medicinal properties of Abies nordmanniana var. eichleri oil have been traditionally used to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to soothe skin irritations and wounds. It can be found in various herbal preparations, including essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
